title: Our Final Predictions For Oscars 2026's Best Supporting Actress Lineup: Will Amy Madigan Win?
text: Screen Rant's final predictions indicate Amy Madigan as the frontrunner for Best Supporting Actress at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony on March 15, 2026. The veteran actress received her previous Oscar nomination 40 years ago. Madigan has secured wins at both the Critics' Choice Awards and the Actor Awards—the two major precursor shows where all three top contenders were nominated. According to the analysis, Madigan's two wins give her the edge over Mosaku and Taylor, particularly because she triumphed in competitions where her closest rivals also competed. The race remains exceptionally tight, with Teyana Taylor placed second with consistent nominations across major award shows despite winning only the Golden Globes, and Wunmi Mosaku secured the BAFTA award, positioning her as a viable challenger. No Best Supporting Actress winner has succeeded without major award wins since 2000.
